perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a green long-sleeved shirt and a black baseball cap sits behind a table against a plain light gray background. He points his finger at the camera and gestures expressively with his hands as he speaks. (2) The scene cuts frequently between different zoom levels of the man as he continues to talk, using hand gestures such as holding up two or three fingers, clenching his fist, and spreading his arms wide. (3) In the final phase, he leans forward closer to the camera, continuing his animated speech and pointing one last time before the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking in an energetic and slightly sarcastic tone over an upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music. (2) The music continues at a steady tempo while the speaker's voice fluctuates in pitch to emphasize certain points, accompanied by occasional 'whoosh' sound effects during scene transitions. (3) The speaking pace remains fast until the very end, where a short, high-pitched giggle sound effect is heard as the male voice delivers a final punchline.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "如果不想要股市韭菜 影片趕快看下去" (If you don't want to be a stock market leek, watch this video now) - Hook tone. (2) Decorative Text: "快傳給你那些韭菜朋友" (Hurry and send this to your leek friends) - Encouraging tone. (3) Functional Text: Mentions "川普關稅政策" (Trump's tariff policy) and "台股兩天跌了快3000點" (Taiwan stocks fell nearly 3000 points in two days) - Informational tone. (4) Decorative Text: "何時才是最低點?" (When is the lowest point?) and "撿到便宜最好時機點?" (Best time to pick up a bargain?) - Questioning tone. (5) Decorative Text: "我是社工師" (I am a social worker) - Revelation/Humorous tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a fast-paced 'talking head' format: Intro Hook -> Economic Commentary -> Professional Twist.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male creator is visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young adult male with dyed light brown hair, wearing a green sweatshirt and a black New Era baseball cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist studio setting with a light gray or off-white wall and a simple white table surface.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a comedic subversion of typical stock market investment advice. It starts by using common 'investor' buzzwords and addressing current market anxieties (Trump tariffs, TAIEX drops) to hook the audience into thinking they are getting financial tips. However, the final reveal that the speaker is a social worker, not a financial analyst, turns the entire video into a satirical joke about the absurdity of everyone giving stock advice during a crash.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal comedic skit rather than a product promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing with colorful large-font text overlays, high-energy delivery typical of Taiwanese YouTuber Cai Aga.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of the term '韭菜' (leek) is a specific internet slang term in Chinese-speaking financial circles referring to retail investors who are repeatedly 'harvested' (lose money) by the market.
